underlying_goal: Check out a GitHub PR via git worktree, address open review comments (extract rule_engine_config and dlp-svc parsing into separate functions) for both global and tenant cfg, and add missing global cfg tests
friction_detail: Claude spent extensive effort trying to build the worktree against a stale shared obj/ dir, hit repeated build/link issues, and was interrupted multiple times before switching to directly checking out the PR branch.
brief_summary: User wanted PR review comments addressed (refactoring + tests) across global and tenant cfg; the code changes were eventually applied correctly but only after a long, friction-filled detour through worktree build problems and multiple user interruptions.
